methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series B → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.9x) to $50M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 4 same-sector + same-stage peers in Biotech & Health. Range: $600M - $3.3B.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Biotech & Health P/S median is 6.1x across 3 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

private.name: Profluent
private.rationale: Same sector (Biotech & Health), same stage (Series B), post-money $600M

data.narrative:
Mission Barns is a Series B biotech and health company founded by Eitan Fischer and David Bowman that has raised over $50M to date. The valuation analysis draws from a comp universe of 8 private peers in the same sector and stage, alongside 3 public biotech benchmarks (RXRX, TEM, ONT.L).

Two triangulation methods are applicable. Stage-progression analysis applies a 1.9x multiplier typical of Series B advancement to the $50M total raised proxy, implying a $95M valuation. The peer-median method references four same-sector, same-stage comparables: Eikon Therapeutics ($3.3B), Neko Health ($1.8B), Asimov ($800M), and Profluent ($600M). This cohort yields a median valuation of $1.3B, with a range of $600M to $3.3B. Public-comp anchoring via price-to-sales multiples (median 6.1x across the three public tickers) cannot be applied without disclosed revenue figures, which private companies rarely provide.

The two applicable methods generate a triangulated valuation range of $81M (low) to $1.5B (high), with a median of $698M. The wide dispersion reflects material uncertainty: the stage-progression method produces a conservative floor anchored to capital deployed, while peer-median valuations are sensitive to heterogeneity within the Series B biotech landscape. Key uncertainties include Mission Barns' clinical progress relative to peers, IP defensibility, and whether the company's specific technology platform commands a valuation premium or discount within the stated peer set.
